ns0:entry.ns0:title: Ed1s0nZ/CyberStrikeAI
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Ed1s0nZ/CyberStrikeAI
Language: go
CyberStrikeAI is an AI-native security testing platform built in Go. It integrates 100+ security tools, an intelligent orchestration engine, role-based testing with predefined security roles, a skills system with specialized testing skills, and comprehensive lifecycle management capabilities.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: IceWhaleTech/CasaOS
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/IceWhaleTech/CasaOS
Language: go
CasaOS - A simple, easy-to-use, elegant open-source Personal Cloud system.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: QuantumNous/new-api
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/QuantumNous/new-api
Language: go
A unified AI model hub for aggregation & distribution. It supports cross-converting various LLMs into OpenAI-compatible, Claude-compatible, or Gemini-compatible formats. A centralized gateway for personal and enterprise model management. 🍥

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Wei-Shaw/sub2api
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Wei-Shaw/sub2api
Language: go
Sub2API is an open-source relay platform that unifies Claude, OpenAI, Gemini, and Antigravity subscriptions into a single endpoint. It supports account sharing and cost-sharing, with seamless native tool compatibility.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: XTLS/RealiTLScanner
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/XTLS/RealiTLScanner
Language: go
A TLS server scanner for Reality

ns0:entry.ns0:title: beclab/Olares
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/beclab/Olares
Language: go
Olares: An Open-Source Personal Cloud to Reclaim Your Data

ns0:entry.ns0:title: bytebase/bytebase
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/bytebase/bytebase
Language: go
World's most advanced database DevSecOps solution for Developer, Security, DBA and Platform Engineering teams. The GitHub/GitLab for database DevSecOps.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: crossplane/crossplane
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/crossplane/crossplane
Language: go
The Cloud Native Control Plane

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dapr/dapr
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dapr/dapr
Language: go
Dapr is a portable runtime for building distributed applications across cloud and edge, combining event-driven architecture with workflow orchestration.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: gin-gonic/gin
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/gin-gonic/gin
Language: go
Gin is a high-performance HTTP web framework written in Go. It provides a Martini-like API but with significantly better performance—up to 40 times faster—thanks to httprouter. Gin is designed for building REST APIs, web applications, and microservices.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: go-gitea/gitea
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/go-gitea/gitea
Language: go
Git with a cup of tea! Painless self-hosted all-in-one software development service, including Git hosting, code review, team collaboration, package registry and CI/CD

ns0:entry.ns0:title: higress-group/higress
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/higress-group/higress
Language: go
🤖 AI Gateway | AI Native API Gateway

ns0:entry.ns0:title: influxdata/telegraf
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/influxdata/telegraf
Language: go
Agent for collecting, processing, aggregating, and writing metrics, logs, and other arbitrary data.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: jesseduffield/lazygit
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/jesseduffield/lazygit
Language: go
simple terminal UI for git commands

ns0:entry.ns0:title: kubernetes-sigs/kueue
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/kubernetes-sigs/kueue
Language: go
Kubernetes-native Job Queueing

ns0:entry.ns0:title: kubernetes/minikube
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/kubernetes/minikube
Language: go
Run Kubernetes locally

ns0:entry.ns0:title: kunchenguid/no-mistakes
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/kunchenguid/no-mistakes
Language: go
git push no-mistakes

ns0:entry.ns0:title: looplj/axonhub
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/looplj/axonhub
Language: go
⚡️ Open-source AI Gateway — Use any SDK to call 100+ LLMs. Built-in failover, load balancing, cost control & end-to-end tracing.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: lxc/incus
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/lxc/incus
Language: go
Powerful system container and virtual machine manager

ns0:entry.ns0:title: multica-ai/multica
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/multica-ai/multica
Language: go
The open-source managed agents platform. Turn coding agents into real teammates — assign tasks, track progress, compound skills.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: netbirdio/netbird
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/netbirdio/netbird
Language: go
Connect your devices into a secure WireGuard®-based overlay network with SSO, MFA and granular access controls.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: podman-container-tools/podman
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/podman-container-tools/podman
Language: go
Podman: A tool for managing OCI containers and pods.

Language: go
